mapper.insert: INSERT INTO accounts (user_id, user_name, email, phone, balance, points, member_level, member_expire_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{balance}, #{points}, #{memberLevel}, #{memberExpireDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE accounts SET user_name = #{userName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, balance = #{balance}, points = #{points}, member_level = #{memberLevel}, member_expire_date = #{memberExpireDate} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE accounts SET balance = #{balance} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE accounts SET points = #{points} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
